Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 6 4 14 0}Too long! A samurai's name should be simple and short![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 6 6 14 0}This letter was sent to the school. It looks like it's addressed to one of our students...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 6 7 14 0}...Wait, is this actually for you? The writing's so shaky, I didn't recognize your name.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 6 8 14 0}It's from an André... something. I don't recall a student with such a foreign name.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 6 9 14 0}The only one that comes to mind is Bebe...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The sender's name is listed as[n]André Laurent Jean Geraux...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's from Bebe... I should read this letter.[n]{f 1 1}
